# Soft6 Tool300 Grep12 Contract

## Soft 6
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.06 with quality bias floor 0.04 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 300
tool result budgets default to 300 chars with 3-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 12
Grep head defaults to 12 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
